nepa_notes__c: LMTF Owyhee Field Office - 3948 Development Ave Marsing ID 83639. 90-minute Interdisciplinary Team scoping session with applicants Sam Uhler and David Smith. Full ID Team assembled: NEPA Specialist Geologist Wildlife Biologist Hydrologist Aquatic Biologist Avian/Big Game Biologist Botanist. Project scope confirmed: 15 acres T. 6 S. R. 5 W. Sec. 28 Jordan Creek watershed. Six parallel field work orders generated at session close.

Government-to-Government Written Correspondence. Government-to-government consultation initiated February 16 2019 per NHPA Section 106. Letter sent to Shoshone-Paiute Tribes of the Duck Valley Reservation. 30-day response window. Tribe responded within window. No historic properties of religious or cultural significance identified. Consultation certified complete March 16 2019.

Online Portal and LMTF Owyhee Field Office Public File. 28-day public comment period on preliminary EA and unsigned FONSI. Two substantive commenters identified: Idaho Conservation League (ICL) and Office of Species Conservation (OSC). Both routed as work orders. Responses incorporated August 15 2019.

Automated notification to Sam Uhler via applicant portal. IDWR Water Permit Application action item triggered by hydrologist work order closure. 30-day SLA assigned to NEPA coordinator. Sam Uhler acknowledged action item. IDWR application initiated April 28 2019.

Automated notification to Sam Uhler: EPA NPDES NOI IDG370000 (Small Suction Dredge) filing triggered by geologist work order closure. 60-day processing clock started. Sam Uhler initiated NPDES NOI filing. NPDES authorization confirmed.
